'''rashusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oatmilk|oatmilk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oatmilk|oatmilk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rashusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræshisith|ræshisith]] || [[word:ræshisij|ræshisij]] || [[word:ræshisish|ræshisish]] || [[word:ræshisi|ræshisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rashushusuth|rashushusuth]] || [[word:rashushusuj|rashushusuj]] || [[word:rashushusush|rashushusush]] || [[word:rashushusu|rashushusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rashusuth|rashusuth]] || [[word:rashusuj|rashusuj]] || [[word:rashusush|rashusush]] || [[word:rashusu|rashusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rashufsuth|rashufsuth]] || [[word:rashufsuj|rashufsuj]] || [[word:rashufsush|rashufsush]] || [[word:rashufsuf|rashufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rashusuthu|rashusuthu]] || [[word:rashusuju|rashusuju]] || [[word:rashusushu|rashusushu]] || [[word:rashusuku|rashusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rashusuth|rashusuth]] || [[word:rashusuj|rashusuj]] || [[word:rashusush|rashusush]] || [[word:rashusu|rashusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rashusuthul|rashusuthul]] || [[word:rashusujul|rashusujul]] || [[word:rashusushul|rashusushul]] || [[word:rashusukul|rashusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rashusuthuthu|rashusuthuthu]] || [[word:rashusujuju|rashusujuju]] || [[word:rashusushushu|rashusushushu]] || [[word:rashusuku|rashusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rashusuthun|rashusuthun]] || [[word:rashusujun|rashusujun]] || [[word:rashusushun|rashusushun]] || [[word:rashusukun|rashusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rashusuthuoro|rashusuthuoro]] || [[word:rashusujuoro|rashusujuoro]] || [[word:rashusushuoro|rashusushuoro]] || [[word:rashusukuoro|rashusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
